characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: A blue octopus who lives in an apartment complex with several other animals. Very gentle, polite and big-hearted, Oswald is always willing to go out of his way to help his friends. His favorite hobbies are playing the piano and singing. All-Loving Hero: His heart's big enough to match his size. Amazing Technicolor Wildlife: He's a blue octopus. Big, Thin, Short Trio: The big to Henry's short and Daisy's thin. Blue Is Heroic: Is a blue octopus who is always ready to go help someone when he needs to.

characters.name: Oswald
characters.description: A blue octopus who lives in an apartment complex with several other animals. Very gentle, polite and big-hearted, Oswald is always willing to go out of his way to help his friends. His favorite hobbies are playing the piano and singing. All-Loving Hero: His heart's big enough to match his size. Amazing Technicolor Wildlife: He's a blue octopus. Big, Thin, Short Trio: The big to Henry's short and Daisy's thin. Blue Is Heroic: Is a blue octopus who is always ready to go help someone when he needs to.

characters.name: Weenie
characters.description: Weenie is Oswald's pet hotdog. Loyal and affectionate, she will stick with him through thick or thin, and is a great companion to him. Canine Companion: For Oswald. She's very loyal and affectionate, sticking with him at all times. Empathy Pet: She inherits a lot of her behavior from Oswald. Hates Baths: In "Weenie Needs a Bath", she runs away from Oswald when he tries to bathe her. Loyal Animal Companion: It is rare to not see her by Oswald's side.

characters.name: Henry
characters.description: Ageless Birthday Episode: His friends celebrate his birthday a week early in "I Guess You Never Know". Art Evolution: Henry's eyes were lime green, but they eventually turned blue green as the series progressed. Big, Thin, Short Trio: The short to Oswald's big and Daisy's thin. The Bore: He dislikes unnecessary extravagance, preferring to stick to his safe, boring daily routines. Of course, excitement inevitably follow him and Oswald around when they're together Catchphrase: His motto, "No more, no less," and "Great Scott!"

characters.name: Daisy
characters.description: Daisy is a close friend of Oswald and Henry. She is high-spirited and enthusiastic, loves all kinds of sports and outdoor activities, and is ready for anything. Big, Thin, Short Trio: The thin to Oswald's big and Henry's short. Catchphrase: "Golly tamale!" and "Wowie-kazowie!" A Dog Named "Dog": Subverted. She's a sunflower rather than a daisy. Fun Personified: Daisy is always trying to get people to have a good time.

characters.name: Johnny Snowman
characters.description: Johnny Snowman is a laid-back snowman who operates an ice cream shop and also has an ice cream truck. Species Surname: He is a snowman, and his surname is Snowman.

characters.name: Egbert and Leo
characters.description: Egbert and Leo are twin egg brothers. Catchphrase: Leo always responds in conversations with an enthusiastic "Yes, yes!" while Egbert refers to everyone as "old boy".

characters.name: Madame Butterfly
characters.description: Madame Butterfly is the proprietor of a local diner, a favorite lunch stop for Oswald and his friends. Pink Means Feminine: She is a pink butterfly. Pretty Butterflies: She's one heck of a beauty, especially when it comes to her calm nature and beautiful appearance. Punny Name: Her name is a pun on the operaMadama Butterfly. Tomboy and Girly Girl: She is the calm, motherly girly girl to Daisy's energetic and sporty tomboy.

characters.name: Catrina
characters.description: Catrina is Madame Butterfly's baby caterpillar that is just learning how to speak. The Baby of the Bunch: With her being a baby caterpillar, she's the youngest of the characters. Constantly Curious: Like all babies, she is very curious about everything around her, but she is always attended by her mom or others to keep her curiosity in check. The Cutie: She's an innocent baby caterpillar with an adorable voice and charms everybody she meets. Graceful Ladies Like Purple: She is almost entirely purple, and she is just as pretty as her mom.
